title: GriffinAI - Rekt
relevance_summary: Cross-chain bridge exploit involving LayerZero misconfiguration

prevention.rule: Block any tx that configures LayerZero peers with unknown addresses.

red_flags: Large minting of tokens far exceeding supply limits
monitoring_rules: Monitor LayerZero peer configurations for unknown addresses
summary: An attacker exploited GriffinAI's LayerZero bridge by configuring a false LayerZero peer, minting 5 billion unauthorized $GAIN tokens, and dumping them for a profit. A guard could have prevented this by blocking any transactions that configure LayerZero peers with unknown addresses.
